justification: All pass criteria met: phantom payment identified as Critical, double-charge/idempotency identified as Critical, specific fixes proposed (refund/compensation pattern for phantom payment, idempotency key for double-charge), safe_to_deploy is false, exactly 3 critical_findings (no padding), no style issues elevated to critical, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: Phantom payment scenario clearly identified with detailed reproduction steps showing charge-then-DB-fail sequence
Idempotency gap identified with concrete double-charge reproduction scenario
Fixes are specific: refund on update failure, pending payment row pattern, idempotency key with SELECT FOR UPDATE
Third critical finding (amount validation) is legitimate and not padding — it represents real financial risk
Important issues section adds valuable depth (null check, missing charge ID, no declined-card path) without inflating critical findings
Production readiness assessment is thorough with concrete deployment risk description
Third finding classified as High rather than Critical, which is reasonable but could be debated for a payment function
